description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin with a steeply pitched gable roof covered in weathered wooden shingles. The exterior walls are constructed from horizontal wooden logs, giving it a traditional log cabin appearance. The front features a small covered porch with a lantern, a stack of firewood, and an axe embedded in a chopping block, suggesting a cozy, lived-in atmosphere. There are two rectangular windows with a warm, glowing appearance, symmetrically placed on the side walls. A tall, black metal chimney pipe extends from the left side of the roof, indicating a wood-burning stove or fireplace inside. The cabin is surrounded by a simple wooden fence and scattered firewood, enhancing its rural charm.
description: A rustic log cabin with a steep gable roof, wooden porch, glowing windows, and a prominent chimney, surrounded by firewood and a simple fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, stacked firewood, lantern, and the main entrance door beneath the steep shingled roof.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the glowing window, the tall chimney pipe, and the porch extending from the front.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain log wall, roof shingles, and the chimney pipe extending upward, with part of the fence visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing another glowing window, the log wall, and the porch extending from the front.
attribute_roof_type: steep gable roof with wooden shingles and a prominent overhang
attribute_window_arrangement: Two medium-sized rectangular windows, one on each side wall, symmetrically placed and evenly spaced, with a warm glowing appearance
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door centered on the front facade beneath the porch roof
